articles.title: TXOne Networks 推出 Sennin 產品線，從 OT 風險評估走向營運防護
articles.description: 以營運優先為核心的 OT 資安領導廠商 TXOne Networks 宣布推出 Sennin 產品線。這是一套 […]

articles.title: Coinbase's asset manager to offer stablecoin credit fund with tokenized share class
articles.description: The fund, dubbed CUSHY, targets yield from onchain lending and private credit, offering tokenized access through Superstate for institutional investors.

articles.title: Banks push to slow stablecoin law as Agora races for charter
articles.description: U.S. banks are looking to delay landmark stablecoin legislation even as crypto firms like Agora push ahead.

articles.title: South Korea seeks 20-year sentence for Delio CEO over $169M crypto fraud
articles.description: Prosecutors say Jeong Sang-ho’s “active deceptive acts” left nearly 2,800 investors frozen out of their funds, as South Korea's crackdown on the crypto industry widens.

articles.title: UK regulator clears path for tokenized funds within existing rules
articles.description: The FCA signs off rules to let UK funds keep registers onchain and add a new Direct‑to‑Fund dealing model, aiming to simplify tokenized funds inside the existing regime.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Aptos (APT) gains 4.4% as nearly all assets rise
articles.description: Internet Computer (ICP), up 2.4% from Wednesday, joined Aptos (APT) as a top performer.

articles.title: Did Bitcoin bottom versus gold? BTC price will reach $167K in 2027 if history repeats
articles.description: Bitcoin’s 40% rebound against gold signals a potential bottom, echoing past setups that preceded strong BTC/USD rallies.

articles.title: Sony 澄清 PS5 驗證爭議，數位遊戲免定期連線
articles.description: Sony 旗下 PlayStation 5 因數位版權管理（DRM）機制引發玩家社群大規模不滿。事件起源於有指 […]

articles.title: US gov’t sues four states, RWAs cross $30 billion: Month in Charts
articles.description: The US CFTC has sued four states for trying to enforce state-level gambling laws on prediction markets, meanwhile Strategy stacked over 56,000 BTC.

articles.title: Spotify introduces verified artist badges to help distinguish humans from AI
articles.description: As AI-generated artists and tracks flood music streaming platforms, Spotify is rolling out a new “Verified by Spotify” badge to help listeners more easily identify authentic human artists. To receive the badge, artists must meet certain criteria. Spotify looks for an identifiable artist presence bot

articles.title: Netflix wants you to watch ‘Clips,’ its TikTok-like vertical video feed
articles.description: Netflix is redesigning its mobile app and introducing Clips, a vertical video feed intended to help users discover new content by sharing highlights from original Netflix programming.

articles.title: The long con: How North Korean spies spent months in-person to drain $285 million from Drift
articles.description: The security intelligence research firm said North Korean-state-backed hackers account for 76% of all crypto scam and hack losses in 2026 and have stolen $6 billion since 2017.

articles.title: AIF 攜高通發布 2026 年最新調查，台企業 AI 應用今年進爆發期
articles.description: 財團法人人工智慧科技基金會（AIF）與高通於今（30 日）共同主辦《2026 台灣產業 AI 化大調查》發布會 […]

articles.title: THORWallet partners with Unblock to expand global non-custodial Mastercard access
articles.description: THORWallet has partnered with Swiss-regulated provider Unblock to expand global access to non-custodial Mastercard solutions, advancing self-custodial finance adoption.

articles.title: MARA Holdings to buy Long Ridge Energy in $1.5 billion AI data center push
articles.description: The deal includes a 505 MW gas plant and 1,600 acres in Ohio, offering over 1 GW power capacity for future AI and IT buildout.

articles.title: OKX rolls out protocol for autonomous AI agents to pay and transact
articles.description: OKX published a new open-standard payment protocol for autonomous AI agents in business and commerce, aiming to support more complex financial interactions.

articles.title: AOI 檢測設備廠牧德，Q1 營收 8.63 億元，EPS 4.61 元
articles.description: 牧德科技今（30）日召開董事會，通過 2026 年第一季財報。首季合併營收為 8.63 億元，毛利為 5.23 […]

articles.title: Meta says its business AI now facilitates 10 million conversations a week
articles.description: Meta said over 8 billion advertisers have used at least one of its gen AI tools

articles.title: Germany’s AllUnity expands EURAU to Solana as euro stablecoins gain traction
articles.description: The firm's MiCA-compliant euro token aims to speed up euro transfers and support regulated onchain finance as the euro stablecoin market doubled since early 2025.

articles.title: 新光銀行主辦熙特爾新能源聯貸案，超額認購 188% 、規模達 8 億元
articles.description: 由新光銀行統籌主辦的 熙特爾新能源聯貸案於今日完成簽約。本次聯貸原訂目標金額為新台幣 6 億元，在銀行同業踴躍 […]
